heading: Election of remedy for beryllium employees and atomic weapons employees
label: 7385d Election of remedy for beryllium employees and atomic weapons employees
notes: Amendments2001—Subsecs. (a) to (d). amended headings and text of subsecs. (a) to (d) generally, substituting present provisions for provisions relating to election to file suit in subsec. (a), applicable time limits in subsec. (b), dismissal of claims in subsec. (c), and dismissal of pending suit in subsec. (d).Pub. L. 107–107
amendments: Amendments2001—Subsecs. (a) to (d). amended headings and text of subsecs. (a) to (d) generally, substituting present provisions for provisions relating to election to file suit in subsec. (a), applicable time limits in subsec. (b), dismissal of claims in subsec. (c), and dismissal of pending suit in subsec. (d).Pub. L. 107–107

children.heading: Effect of tort cases filed before enactment of original law
children.label: a Effect of tort cases filed before enactment of original law

children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), if an otherwise eligible individual filed a tort case specified in subsection (d) before , such individual shall be eligible for compensation and benefits under part B.October 30, 2000

If such tort case remained pending as of , and such individual does not dismiss such tort case before , such individual shall not be eligible for such compensation or benefits.December 28, 2001December 31, 2003

children.heading: Effect of tort cases filed between enactment of original law and enactment of 2001 amendments
children.label: b Effect of tort cases filed between enactment of original law and enactment of 2001 amendments

children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), if an otherwise eligible individual filed a tort case specified in subsection (d) during the period beginning on , and ending on , such individual shall not be eligible for such compensation or benefits.October 30, 2000December 28, 2001
If such individual dismisses such tort case on or before the last permissible date specified in paragraph (3), such individual shall be eligible for such compensation or benefits.

children.label: B
children.text: The date that is 30 months after the date the individual first becomes aware that an illness covered by part B of a covered employee may be connected to the exposure of the covered employee in the performance of duty under .section 7384n of this title

children.heading: Effect of tort cases filed after enactment of 2001 amendments
children.label: c Effect of tort cases filed after enactment of 2001 amendments

children.text: If an otherwise eligible individual files a tort case specified in subsection (d) after , such individual shall not be eligible for such compensation or benefits if a final court decision is entered against such individual in such tort case.December 28, 2001

If such a final court decision is not entered, such individual shall nonetheless not be eligible for such compensation or benefits, except as follows: If such individual dismisses such tort case on or before the last permissible date specified in paragraph (3), such individual shall be eligible for such compensation and benefits.

children.label: B
children.text: The date that is 30 months after the date the individual first becomes aware that an illness covered by part B of a covered employee may be connected to the exposure of the covered employee in the performance of duty under .section 7384n of this title

children.heading: Covered tort cases
children.label: d Covered tort cases
children.text: A tort case specified in this subsection is a tort case alleging a claim referred to in against a beryllium vendor or atomic weapons employer.section 7385b of this title

children.heading: Workers’ compensation
children.label: e Workers’ compensation
children.text: This section does not apply to an administrative or judicial proceeding under a State or Federal workers’ compensation law.
